title: broadinstitute/pipseq pipeline parameters
description: Single-cell QC pipeline for PIPseq data with CRISPR guide assignment

input_output_options.title: Input/output options
input_output_options.description: Define where the pipeline should find input data and save output data.

samplesheet.description: Path to comma-separated file containing information about the samples.
samplesheet.help_text: CSV file with columns: data_dir, dragen_file_prefix, subsample_id, subsample_basename

supersample_id.help_text: All subsamples in the samplesheet belong to this supersample

supersample_basename.help_text: Used to name output files and directories

outdir.description: The output directory where the results will be saved.

pipeline_options.title: Pipeline options
pipeline_options.description: Options specific to the PIPseq QC pipeline

num_input_cells.help_text: Expected number of cells for QC calculations

run_guide_assignment.description: Whether to run CRISPR guide assignment

min_valid_guides.description: Minimum number of valid guides for guide assignment QC

max_valid_guides.description: Maximum number of valid guides for guide assignment QC

institutional_config_options.title: Institutional config options
institutional_config_options.description: Parameters used to describe centralised config profiles.
institutional_config_options.help_text: These parameters are not used by the pipeline. They are used by nf-core/configs to describe supported institutional profiles.

custom_config_version.description: Git commit id for Institutional configs.

generic_options.title: Generic options
generic_options.description: Less common options for the pipeline, typically set in a config file.
generic_options.help_text: These options are common to all nf-core pipelines and allow you to customise some of the core preferences for how the pipeline runs.

publish_dir_mode.description: Method used to save pipeline results to output directory.
publish_dir_mode.help_text: The Nextflow `publishDir` option specifies which intermediate files should be saved to the output directory. This option tells the pipeline what method should be used to move these files.

monochrome_logs.description: Do not use coloured log outputs.

tracedir.description: Directory to keep pipeline Nextflow logs and reports.

validate_params.description: Boolean whether to validate parameters against the schema at runtime

show_hidden_params.help_text: By default, parameters set as _hidden_ in the schema are not shown on the command line when a user runs with `--help`. Specifying this option will tell the pipeline to show all parameters.
